identity.name: ITDR — Brute-Force Causing Account Lockout (Microsoft)
identity.summary: Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-ITDR-005. Plane: ITDR. Primary technique: T1110.003. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.
identity.description:
Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-ITDR-005. Plane: ITDR. Primary technique: T1110.003. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.

Source scenario: SIM-ITDR-005.
UC: Account-Lockout State Transition / TC: Repeated Failed Sign-Ins Trigger Lockout, Lockout Event Logged.

prerequisites.description: Lab environment matching scenario SIM-ITDR-005 requirements.

payload.code:
# step-1: Pre-flight: confirm brute_force_lockout pattern is supported
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli describe idp_signin_emulator \
  | jq -e '.eal_targets'
# step-2: 10 failed sign-ins triggering account lockout — Microsoft shape
: "${COLLECTOR_URL:=https://collector.cortexsim-canary.invalid/idp/events}"
: "${COLLECTOR_HOST:=collector.cortexsim-canary.invalid}"
cat > /tmp/itdr-005.yml <<YML
campaign_id: CMP-ITDR-005
name: "ITDR — Microsoft brute-force lockout"
authorized_by: "domain-consultant@paloaltonetworks.com"
simulation_authorized: true
target_allowlist:
  - "$COLLECTOR_HOST"
dry_run: false
tags: [itdr, microsoft, brute-force, lockout]
steps:
  - step_id: step-01
    plugin: idp_signin_emulator
    params:
      collector_url: "$COLLECTOR_URL"
      provider: microsoft
      event_pattern: brute_force_lockout
      target_user: "alice.singh@cortexsim-canary.invalid"
      iterations: 1
      burst_count: 10
YML
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli run /tmp/itdr-005.yml --live
# step-3: Same target user, second source IP — password spray pattern
: "${COLLECTOR_URL:=https://collector.cortexsim-canary.invalid/idp/events}"
: "${COLLECTOR_HOST:=collector.cortexsim-canary.invalid}"
cat > /tmp/itdr-005-spray.yml <<YML
campaign_id: CMP-ITDR-005
name: "ITDR — Microsoft password spray"
authorized_by: "domain-consultant@paloaltonetworks.com"
simulation_authorized: true
target_allowlist:
  - "$COLLECTOR_HOST"
dry_run: false
steps:
  - step_id: step-01
    plugin: idp_signin_emulator
    params:
      collector_url: "$COLLECTOR_URL"
      provider: microsoft
      event_pattern: brute_force_lockout
      target_user: "alice.singh@cortexsim-canary.invalid"
      iterations: 1
      burst_count: 5
YML
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli run /tmp/itdr-005-spray.yml --live
